description: Open US federal research funding from the terminal, keyless — Grants.gov open opportunities with deadline/agency/award/eligibility filters, plus awarded NIH RePORTER and NSF grants as funding benchmarks.

novel_features.name: Award Cap Fallback
novel_features.description: Filters by the best available award amount — awardCeiling with an estimatedFunding fallback — because Grants.gov frequently reports a zero ceiling on real opportunities. Output labels the fallback so users know the number is an estimate.

novel_features.name: Eligibility Substring Filter
novel_features.description: Client-side applicant-type filter over per-opportunity fetchOpportunity details, e.g. limit results to universities or small businesses without reading each synopsis.

novel_features.name: Cross-Source Doctor
novel_features.description: One command live-checks all three keyless upstreams (Grants.gov Search2, NIH RePORTER, NSF Awards) before a research session, with per-source status.

novel_features.name: Awarded-vs-Open Benchmarking
novel_features.description: Pairs open Grants.gov calls with historically awarded NIH RePORTER and NSF grants so applicants can benchmark typical award sizes for a topic before applying.
